Based on the search results provided, I cannot identify breaking news from today (April 22, 2026) that would move prediction markets. The most recent developments in the search results are from **April 2, 2026** — three weeks ago — when the IMF released its Article IV Consultation with the United States.

The April 2 IMF announcement contained significant information:

signals.headline: IMF Confirms "Little Room to Cut Interest Rates in 2026"** | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw:
IMF Confirms "Little Room to Cut Interest Rates in 2026"** | YES | HIGH confidence

The IMF Executive Board explicitly stated that rate cuts would only be appropriate if there is "a material worsening in labor market prospects alongside a decline in inflationary pressures."
